differences.justification: OllamaBaseChatModel is package-private, so the protected field cannot leak to external subclasses
Image is intentionally exposed by OllamaImageModel because it implements the core ImageModel API and returns generated images through the core Image type
Core langchain4j type intentionally exposed by OllamaEmbeddingModel's observability API (listeners())
Core langchain4j type intentionally exposed by OllamaEmbeddingModel's provider() method
Core langchain4j type intentionally exposed by OllamaEmbeddingModel's doEmbed(EmbeddingRequest)
Core langchain4j type intentionally exposed by OllamaEmbeddingModel's doEmbed(EmbeddingRequest)
embedAll now inherits its default implementation from EmbeddingModel (routing through embed(EmbeddingRequest)/doEmbed); the method is still present and callable via inheritance — non-breaking
